reviewer.displayName: SIC TRANSIT GLORIA MUNDI GLORIA MUNDI

reviews.comment:
Muy malo servicio del ACA. Dicen que lavan por orden de llegada y empiezan a hacerlo a las 9 de la mañana. Pero aunque dejes tu auto a las 5 de la mañana y te digan que no hay ninguno adelante tuyo, cuando vas a buscar tu auto, están lavando otros adelante de tu turno.  No se si lavan a los  "amigos" o es solo una gran desorganización. 3 dias seguidos quedé sin poder lavarlo.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from ACA. They say they wash in order of arrival and start at 9:00 a.m. But even if you drop off your car at 5:00 a.m. and they tell you there's no one ahead of you, when you go to pick up your car, they're washing others ahead of your turn. I don't know if they're washing "friends" or it's just a huge lack of organization. I couldn't get a car washed for three days in a row.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdEszeFp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar y fijarse todo antes de salir a la ruta. El aire es gratis. También vi que limpian los autos. Tienen descuento los que son asociados del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Good place to charge up and check everything before hitting the road. Air conditioning is free. I also saw they clean cars. ACA members get a discount.

reviews.comment:
